competencies.name: Delivery
competencies.descriptor: Completes assigned tasks reliably and on time with guidance from senior colleagues.

competencies.name: Communication
competencies.descriptor: Communicates clearly within the team; proactively surfaces blockers before they become escalations.

competencies.name: Learning
competencies.descriptor: Actively seeks feedback and incorporates it; demonstrates continuous improvement within their role.

competencies.name: Collaboration
competencies.descriptor: Works well with immediate teammates; builds positive working relationships.

competencies.name: Delivery
competencies.descriptor: Owns end-to-end delivery of defined work; identifies and manages risks within scope.

competencies.name: Communication
competencies.descriptor: Communicates effectively with stakeholders outside the immediate team; written and verbal communication is clear and concise.

competencies.name: Technical depth
competencies.descriptor: Demonstrates strong domain knowledge; produces high-quality work with minimal rework.

competencies.name: Collaboration
competencies.descriptor: Cross-team collaborator; supports junior colleagues informally.

competencies.name: Ownership
competencies.descriptor: Takes end-to-end ownership of significant deliverables; does not require management oversight on execution.

competencies.name: Stakeholder influence
competencies.descriptor: Shapes decisions across teams; translates technical complexity for non-technical partners.

competencies.name: Scope amplification
competencies.descriptor: Multiplies impact beyond own squad — e.g., mentoring, shared tooling, cross-team patterns.

competencies.name: Judgment
competencies.descriptor: Makes sound trade-off decisions independently; escalates the right things at the right time.

competencies.name: Organisational impact
competencies.descriptor: Initiatives have measurable impact on multiple teams or business outcomes.

competencies.name: Strategic influence
competencies.descriptor: Shapes direction at the org level; drives alignment across teams on complex, ambiguous problems.

competencies.name: Talent development
competencies.descriptor: Actively grows L4/L5 colleagues; creates leverage through others.

competencies.name: Technical / domain leadership
competencies.descriptor: Recognised as a go-to authority; sets standards and best practices that others follow.

competencies.name: Company-wide impact
competencies.descriptor: Work is consequential at the company level; decisions have multi-year implications.

competencies.name: External recognition
competencies.descriptor: Recognised externally (customers, partners, or community) as a leader in their domain.

competencies.name: Organisational design
competencies.descriptor: Shapes how teams and processes are structured to deliver outcomes.

competencies.name: Thought leadership
competencies.descriptor: Generates novel ideas that create competitive advantage or step-change improvement.
